title: Veloxy's Invisible Armor
description: This resource pack makes your armor invisible on the player and when looking at skin in the inventory hud
body:
This resource pack turns all armor invisble on the player and when looking at the player in the inventory hud, It is only Client-side due to being a resource pack but gives a clean look to your character 
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b68e6b1337cc3c7208940a67330c664c5a886a14_0.webp)
